goals.title: Source of truth: Multica PER-160 / MESH-GAP-008.
goals.objective: Source of truth: Multica PER-160 / MESH-GAP-008.
goals.evidence: Read PER-160 issue, metadata, empty comment history, branch policy, mesh gap plan, deep-interview spec, UI reference tasks, and relevant AGENTS guides; scoped implementation to audio session consent/events.

goals.title: Require explicit target selector plus consent token for streaming met...
goals.objective: Require explicit target selector plus consent token for streaming methods: `Transcription.ProcessAudio`, `WakeWord.ProcessAudio`, and future live mic stream paths.

goals.title: Keep `STTCoordinator.Listen`, `STTCoordinator.Audio`, `STTCoordinator...
goals.objective: Keep `STTCoordinator.Listen`, `STTCoordinator.Audio`, `STTCoordinator.Control`, and playback controls local-only/internal by default.

goals.title: Expose typed session lifecycle methods and status/events for UI/SDK c...
goals.objective: Expose typed session lifecycle methods and status/events for UI/SDK consumption without raw microphone stream exposure.

goals.title: Add typed audio session contract models and topic constants in `app/s...
goals.objective: Add typed audio session contract models and topic constants in `app/shared/contracts/models/stt.py`.

goals.title: Register `AudioSession.Prepare`, `RequestConsent`, `Start`, `Stop`, `...
goals.objective: Register `AudioSession.Prepare`, `RequestConsent`, `Start`, `Stop`, `Status`, and `Events` on `GatewayService`, backed by an in-memory session registry suitable for process-local Gateway runtime.

goals.title: Add consent/session fields to streaming audio payloads, validate sele...
goals.objective: Add consent/session fields to streaming audio payloads, validate selector/session/token/sample format in STT transcription and wakeword streaming handlers, and publish typed `AudioSession.Events` updates for accepted/denied/result events.

goals.title: Keep batch TTS/transcription/wakeword request behavior unchanged and...
goals.objective: Keep batch TTS/transcription/wakeword request behavior unchanged and update capability catalog/graph policy metadata where needed so UI sees session/privacy/TTL requirements.

goals.title: Add focused unit tests for contract classification, session lifecycle...
goals.objective: Add focused unit tests for contract classification, session lifecycle, streaming denial without selector/token, approved event publication, and route/catalog policy visibility.

goals.title: `uv run ruff check app/shared/contracts/models/stt.py app/services/ga...
goals.objective: `uv run ruff check app/shared/contracts/models/stt.py app/services/gateway/service.py app/services/stt_transcription/service.py app/services/stt_wakeword/service.py tests/unit/gateway/test_audio_session_contracts.py tests/unit/stt_transcription/test_audio_session_policy.py tests/unit/stt_wakeword/test_audio_session_policy.py`

goals.title: Consent tokens in this slice are process-local and intentionally not...
goals.objective: Consent tokens in this slice are process-local and intentionally not durable across Gateway restarts.

goals.title: The event stream is a bus-level unified contract; full HTTP SSE/WebSo...
goals.objective: The event stream is a bus-level unified contract; full HTTP SSE/WebSocket transport can build on it without changing STT/TTS service internals.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
